title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_worktree_remove
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_worktree_remove' MCP tool.

rootIndex.description: 0-based index into the MCP file roots list; ignored when workspaceRoot is set.

allWorkspaceRoots.description: Fan out across all MCP file roots.

path.description: Path of the worktree to remove. Must not be the main worktree.

force.description: Pass `--force` to allow removal of worktrees with uncommitted changes.
